methodology: Task-level recalibration of Frey & Osborne (2017) automation probabilities. O*NET work activities mapped to 5 task categories (routine manual, routine cognitive, non-routine manual, non-routine cognitive, social). Each category receives a context-adjusted risk multiplier reflecting South Asian LMIC automation adoption rates, capital investment levels, and informal economy prevalence.
